action.reasoning: Observation: TTA gave +0.001 (0.8506 vs 0.8497). Small but new best. Analysis: ~2.67h remaining, 19 iters left. ConvNeXt-Tiny + LA + mixup/cutmix is solid. Could try: (1) Ensemble multiple seeds, (2) ConvNeXt-Small (50M params, still under 1B), (3) EMA, (4) Train longer with different seed and ensemble. Decision: Train another ConvNeXt-Tiny with different seed and ensemble at predict time. Save two checkpoints. Also use EMA in training.
